---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">

    <!-- Text -->
    <div class="hero-text">
      <div class="fade-in">
        <div class="hero-badge">
          <span class="hero-badge-dot"></span>
          <span>Open to opportunities &middot; Atlanta, GA</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="fade-in d1">
        <h1 class="hero-headline">
          Statistics<br>
          <em>meets</em><br>
          biology.
        </h1>
      </div>

      <div class="fade-in d2">
        <p class="hero-bio">
          I'm <strong>Youwei Hu</strong> &mdash; a Biostatistics M.S. candidate at
          Emory University. I build statistical models and interactive tools for
          problems in neurology and infectious disease.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="fade-in d3">
        <div class="hero-buttons">
          <a href="projects.html" class="btn-primary-moss">View My Work</a>
          <a href="files/CV.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn-outline-moss">Download CV</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Photo -->
    <div class="hero-photo-wrap fade-in d2">
      <div class="hero-photo-frame">
        <img src="images/selfy.png" alt="Youwei Hu">
      </div>
      <div class="hero-photo-card">
        <div class="card-sub">Currently</div>
        <div class="card-main">M.S. Biostatistics &middot; Emory</div>
        <div class="card-loc">Atlanta, GA</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHAT I WORK ON -->
<section class="focus-section">
  <div class="section-header fade-in">
    <span class="section-header-label">What I Work On</span>
    <div class="section-header-line"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="focus-row fade-in">
    <span class="focus-num">01</span>
    <div>
      <div class="focus-title">EEG &amp; Alzheimer&rsquo;s</div>
      <p class="focus-desc">Developing biomarkers from resting-state EEG data to distinguish MCI from
      Alzheimer&rsquo;s Disease, in collaboration with the Goizueta Brain Health Institute.</p>
    </div>
    <span class="focus-tag">Neurological Research</span>
  </div>
  
  <div class="focus-row fade-in">
    <span class="focus-num">02</span>
    <div>
      <div class="focus-title">Interactive Data Tools</div>
      <p class="focus-desc">Building Shiny dashboards and visualization pipelines that turn complex statistical outputs into tools researchers can actually use.</p>
    </div>
    <span class="focus-tag">Data Engineering</span>
  </div>

  <div class="focus-row fade-in">
    <span class="focus-num">03</span>
    <div>
      <div class="focus-title">Viral Shedding Dynamics</div>
      <p class="focus-desc">Bayesian hierarchical models in Stan that integrate heterogeneous lab measurements &mdash; Ct values and viral load &mdash; to characterize infectious disease trajectories.</p>
    </div>
    <span class="focus-tag">Infectious Disease</span>
  </div>

  <div class="focus-row fade-in">
    <span class="focus-num">04</span>
    <div>
      <div class="focus-title">Shedding Hub Data Pipeline</div>
      <p class="focus-desc">Literature review to identify longitudinal viral shedding datasets, followed by manual extraction and an LLM-powered pipeline that parses data into standardized YAML files &mdash; building a benchmark dataset for AI model training and validation.</p>
    </div>
    <span class="focus-tag">Data Infrastructure</span>
  </div>
</section>

```
